allow.label: Allow only
allow.desc: Only allowed sites are accessible, all others are blocked

block.label: Block
block.desc: All sites are accessible except blocked ones

focus.label: Deep Focus
focus.desc: Focus for a period of time

pomodoro.label: Pomodoro

en.noAllowUrl: No allowed sites specified. Please add at least one site to the allow list.
en.noBlockUrl: No blocked sites specified. Start without any site restrictions?
en.noTime: Please set both focus time and break time for Pomodoro

allow.label: 仅允许
allow.desc: 只允许访问指定站点，所有其他站点都被阻止

block.label: 屏蔽
block.desc: 除了被屏蔽的站点外，所有站点都可以访问

focus.label: 深度专注
focus.desc: 在未来一段时间内保持专注状态

pomodoro.label: 番茄钟
pomodoro.desc: 劳逸结合，让专注更高效

zh_CN.noAllowUrl: 未指定允许的网站。请至少添加一个网站到允许列表。
zh_CN.noBlockUrl: 未指定阻止网站。是否无限制启动？
zh_CN.noTime: 番茄钟需要设置专注时长和休息时长

fr.noAllowUrl: Pas de site autorisé. Ajoutez au moins un site dans la liste des autorisations.
fr.noBlockUrl: Pas de sites bloqués. Commencer sans restriction ?
